form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (Sr2) over 1710m at Goulburn was 3rd-3.4 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Lookmeover (2:02.60) in 3yo NR up to 57 on March 30 at $7. Showed ability the outing before when he ran on from midfield and won by 8 m as favourite (Sr2) at Canberra (2:09.70) beating Dark Miracle in 3yo 1W/TS on March 15 at $2.70 at the bell was 3rd-4.2. Has the ability to figure prominently from a better draw.
